mapper.insert: insert into studentinfo (name, sex, idCard, phone, workUnit,city,district, address, image,duties,invoiceId) values (#{name}, #{sex}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{workUnit}, #{city},#{district},#{address}, #{image},#{duties},#{invoiceId})
mapper.select:
select s.*,v.bangNo,v.bankName,v.invoiceHead,v.invoiceNo,v.isSpecial,v.unitAddress,v.unitPhone,sc.id as studentCertificateId,sc.pay,sc.receiptPath,ts.trainsClassId,ts.trainsClassName,ti.trainsId,ti.trainsTitle from studentinfo s left join invoiceinfo v on s.invoiceId = v.id left join studentcertificate sc on sc.studentId = s.id left join trainsclass ts on ts.trainsClassId = sc.trainsClassId left join trainsinfo ti on ts.trainsInfoId = ti.trainsId
s.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and s.invoiceId is not null
and s.invoiceId is null
and sc.pay = 1 and sc.pay = 0
order by s.id desc
